name: GH_SamplingSphere
summary: Represents a coloured sphere that can be sampled at various rotations.

constructors.name: GH_SamplingSphere
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_SamplingSphere class

methods.name: SampleSphere(Sphere)
methods.summary: Sample the UV locations of a sphere. The sphere should be centered on the world origin.

returns.doc: A two-dimensional array of Sphere UV locations, one for each sample point.

methods.name: SampleSphere(Sphere, GH_MemoryBitmap)
methods.signature: public Bitmap SampleSphere(Sphere sphere, GH_MemoryBitmap texture)
methods.summary: Sample a sphere with a UV texture and return a bitmap of sampled values.

params.name: sphere
params.doc: Sphere to sample, it should be centered on the world origin.

params.name: texture
params.doc: Texture to sample, the texture will not be modified.

returns.doc: A bitmap of Size x Size pixels.

properties.name: SampleCount
properties.summary: Gets the total number of samples contained in this sampling grid.

properties.name: Size
properties.summary: Gets the size of this sample grid.
